case_title: CAMPOS, JORGE et al vs. PALMER, LADON et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION IN LIEU OF PERSONAL TESTIMONY FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAMPOS, JORGE CAMPOS, OLYMPIA
